description:
Sarvangasana and it`s Benefits | Yoga Asanas | International Yoga Day Special 2016 , 21st June

Benefits :

* Helps in Maintaining celibacy and saves from wet dreams
 
* Improves Brain Power

* Beneficial in thyroid disease

* Improve Digestion

* Acts as blood purifier and relieves mental tension
